title: ReOred
description: This mod aims to add ores, armor, tools and more to Minecraft to make it more immersive.
body:
# As this mod was made using MCreator and MCreator does not support fabric now, the project is now abandoned.

This mod aims to add ores, armor, tools and more to Minecraft to make it more immersive. This mod is inspired by two great resource expansion mods Metallurgy by ShadowClaimer and Metallurgy 4: Reforged.

Though both mods are stuck on older versions of Minecraft Metallurgy on 1.7.10 (Not under development anymore!), Metallurgy 4: Reforged on 1.12.2 (Still under development but does not plan to port to new Minecraft versions!).

DISCLAIMER:
This mod is NOT in any way connected the Metallurgy mods. This is a mod made from scratch by me!

 

The mod is currently in-development in the AlphaDev category.
 

The development categories will be as follows:

AlphaDev:
- Add at least 2 new ores with armor and tool sets respectively. (Silver - Done)
- ~~Add "Oak" wood armor.~~ (Completed)
- ~~Add copper armor and tools.~~ (Completed)

BetaDev:
- Add at least 8 new ores with armor and tool sets respectively to get the grand total to 10 new ores.
- Add more wood armor variants.
- Add smelting recipes for copper stuff.
- Add 1 set of new decoration blocks (>=5 blocks).
- May add 1 new ore to The Nether and 1 new ore to The End the with armor and tool sets respectively.

Alpha:
- Add at least 15 new ores with armor and tool sets respectively to get the grand total to 25 new ores.
- Add the remaining wood armor variants.
- Add 1 set of new decoration blocks to get the grand total to 2 sets.
- Add new ores to The Nether and The End to bring the grand total to 2 new ores in each dimension.
- Add more wooden variants of the crafting table.

Beta:
- Add at least 15 new ores with armor and tool sets respectively to get the grand total to 40 new ores.
- Add the remaining crafting table variants.
- Add 2 sets of decoration blocks to get the grand total to 4 sets.
- Add 3 new ores to The Nether and The End to bring the grand total to 5 new ores in each dimension.
- Add 2 new wood types.

Pre-Release:
-Fix bugs.

Release-1.0:
- 40 new ores added with armor and tool sets respectively.
- New wooden armors and crafting tables added.
- Copper armor and tools added.
- 4 sets(20+ blocks) of decoration blocks added.
- 2 new wood types added.
- Retextured Copper and Silver armor and tools.

Snapshots:
- These will be in-development versions of upcoming releases which are not to be used commercially as new updates may break things. (Only to be used if you are a developer or if you want to experience new features early or if you want to help in finding bugs.)

Goals For Future-Releases (eg. Release-1.1, Release.2.0, etc.):
- Must add 10 new ores.
- Must add 1 set of decoration blocks.
- Must add 2 new wood types.
- Must add 1 new machine (ALLOY SMELTERS, NEW SMELTERS, ORE DOUBLEING TECH, ETC.)
- And more...
 


You are free to use the mod in your modpacks, credits shall be given ;)

Permission must be taken before forking or republishing by modifying the mod!

 

Discord: Coming soon!

Contact me on Discord: coredex_source
